testcase.name: TC01

failure.message: Welcome message is not displayed as expected expected [Welcome phamnam@sharklasers.com] but found []

failure.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

failure.message: The message is not displayed as expected expected [The new password cannot be the same with the current password] but found [Password changed! Click here to login.]
